product: VMware Cloud Foundation SDDC Manager REST API 9.1

request_headers.Content-Type: application/json on every request with a body

expand_cluster.wire_rule: the PATCH body contains exactly the clusterExpansionSpec key; optional hostSpec fields are omitted when unset, never sent as empty strings
expand_cluster.location_rule: the response Location header path must be exactly '/v1/tasks/' + task.id; a missing Location or a mismatched id is a contract violation and ExpandCluster returns an error naming both values
expand_cluster.failure: non-202 decodes the Error envelope into *APIError

get_task.not_found: 404 decodes into *APIError with StatusCode 404 and is terminal (never retried)

success.note: docs pin method/path/purpose ('Cancel a Task by ID'); the 200-with-Task success body is this fixture's mock decision

task_states.unknown_status_rule: a status outside both sets is a contract violation and WaitForTask returns an error naming the status

polling.backoff: delay starts at InitialDelay, doubles after every read, and is capped at MaxDelay
polling.sleep_injection: sleeping happens only through the injected Sleep func(ctx, d) so tests never wait on wall clock; ctx cancellation during sleep aborts with ctx.Err()
polling.transient_rule: a 5xx poll response is transient: retry with the same backoff schedule; three consecutive 5xx responses give up and surface the last *APIError; any 2xx read resets the consecutive-failure count

error_preservation.task_error_shape: recursive: errorCode, errorType, message, remediationMessage, referenceToken, causes[{type,message}], nestedErrors[TaskError]
error_preservation.decode_rule: the full tree including causes and every nesting level is decoded and retained on the returned Task; a FAILED task is returned together with *TaskFailedError wrapping that Task
error_preservation.reference_tokens_rule: ReferenceTokens(task) walks task errors then subTask errors depth-first pre-order (an error before its nestedErrors) and returns every non-empty referenceToken once, first occurrence wins
